case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. MARIO ROBERTO RIVERA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $495.16 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMELY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, MARIO ROBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED DEC-20-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, MARIO ROBERTO
REQUEST TO AMEND PARTY NAME BEFORE HEARING (SMALL CLAIMS). FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMELY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMELY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMELY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERA, MARIO ROBERTO $495.16 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $580.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-06-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
